impact: This advances checkbox-25 by validating that lifecycle assistance may generate read-only or draft previews, while mocked official lifecycle, payment, certification, upload, and inspection scheduling actions fail closed unless the confirmation exactly matches the session, action, and phrase.
summary: Add fixture-only DevHub lifecycle guardrail tests for mocked previews and exact session confirmation gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-25: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving mocked lifecycle actions can produce read-only or draft previews but cannot perform official extension, reactivation, cancellation, refund, payment, certification, upload, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
